sentences.target: Mon cousin est ouvrier sur le chantier.

translations.fr: Mon cousin est ouvrier sur le chantier.
translations.en: My cousin is a worker at the site.
translations.es: Mi primo es obrero en la obra.
translations.de: Mein Cousin ist Arbeiter auf der Baustelle.
translations.it: Mio cugino è operaio nel cantiere.
translations.ko: 내 사촌은 공사 현장에서 일하는 노동자예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我堂兄是工地上的工人。
translations.ru: Мой двоюродный брат рабочий на стройке.
translations.pt: Meu primo é operário na obra.
translations.he: בן דוד שלי הוא פועל באתר הבנייה.
translations.vi: Anh họ tôi là công nhân ở công trường.
translations.ar: ابن عمي عامل في موقع البناء.
translations.nl: Mijn neef is arbeider op de bouwplaats.
translations.uk: Мій двоюрідний брат робітник на будівництві.
translations.hi: मेरा चचेरा भाई निर्माण स्थल पर मजदूर है.
translations.pl: Mój kuzyn jest robotnikiem na budowie.
translations.el: Ο ξάδερφός μου είναι εργάτης στο εργοτάξιο.
translations.nb: Min fetter er arbeider på byggeplassen.
translations.id: Sepupu saya adalah pekerja di lokasi konstruksi.
translations.sv: Min kusin är arbetare på byggarbetsplatsen.
translations.ro: Vărul meu este muncitor pe șantier.
translations.cs: Můj bratranec je dělník na stavbě.
translations.da: Min fætter er arbejder på byggepladsen.
translations.ja: いとこは工事現場の作業員です.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies the subject noun 'cousin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
3rd person singular present of 'être'; copula linking the subject to the predicate noun.
Predicate nominal (complement of the copula), masculine singular.
Preposition introducing the locative complement 'le chantier'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'chantier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur' specifying location.

sentences.target: L'ouvrier arrive à sept heures demain.

translations.fr: L'ouvrier arrive à sept heures demain.
translations.en: The worker arrives at seven tomorrow.
translations.es: El obrero llega mañana a las siete.
translations.de: Der Arbeiter kommt morgen um sieben.
translations.pt: O operário chega amanhã às sete.
translations.vi: Người công nhân sẽ đến lúc bảy giờ ngày mai.
translations.nl: De arbeider komt morgen om zeven uur.
translations.el: Ο εργάτης θα έρθει αύριο στις επτά.
translations.nb: Arbeideren kommer i morgen klokka sju.
translations.id: Pekerja itu akan tiba besok pukul tujuh.
translations.sv: Arbetaren kommer i morgon klockan sju.
translations.ro: Muncitorul sosește mâine la ora șapte.
translations.da: Arbejderen kommer i morgen klokken syv.
translations.ja: その作業員は明日7時に来ます.

tokens.explanation: Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; masculine singular; part of the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject phrase.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive, agrees with the subject.
Preposition introducing the time expression 'sept heures'.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' to indicate the time.
Plural noun; object of 'à' in the time-of-day expression 'à sept heures'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'arrive'.

sentences.target: Je parle avec un ouvrier sympa.

translations.fr: Je parle avec un ouvrier sympa.
translations.en: I'm talking with a friendly worker.
translations.es: Estoy hablando con un obrero simpático.
translations.de: Ich spreche mit einem netten Arbeiter.
translations.it: Sto parlando con un operaio simpatico.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在和一位友善的工人聊天。
translations.yue: 我而家同一個友善嘅工人傾偈。
translations.pt: Estou falando com um operário simpático.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nói chuyện với một công nhân thân thiện.
translations.nl: Ik praat met een vriendelijke arbeider.
translations.hi: मैं एक दोस्ताना मज़दूर से बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med en hyggelig arbeider.
translations.id: Saya sedang berbicara dengan seorang pekerja yang ramah.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med en vänlig arbetare.
translations.da: Jeg taler med en venlig arbejder.
translations.ja: 私は親切な作業員と話しています.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'parle'.
1st person singular present; main verb taking a comitative complement with 'avec'.
Preposition introducing the comitative complement 'un ouvrier sympa'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'ouvrier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.
Colloquial adjective (often invariable) modifying 'ouvrier'.

sentences.target: On cherche un ouvrier pour la fuite.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ uvʁje puʁ la fɥit/

translations.fr: On cherche un ouvrier pour la fuite.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ uvʁje puʁ la fɥit/
translations.en: We're looking for a worker for the leak.
translations.es: Estamos buscando a un obrero para arreglar la fuga de agua.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Arbeiter, um das Leck zu reparieren.
translations.it: Cerchiamo un operaio per riparare la perdita d'acqua.
translations.ko: 우리는 누수를 고쳐 줄 노동자를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找工人来修漏水。
translations.ru: Мы ищем рабочего, чтобы устранить протечку.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um operário para consertar o vazamento.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים פועל לתקן את הנזילה.
translations.tr: Sızıntıyı tamir edecek bir işçi arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một công nhân để sửa chỗ rò rỉ nước.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن عامل لإصلاح التسرب.
translations.nl: We zoeken een arbeider om het lek te repareren.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо робітника, щоб полагодити витік.
translations.hi: हम रिसाव को ठीक करने के लिए एक मज़दूर ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε εργάτη για να φτιάξει τη διαρροή.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en arbeider for å fikse lekkasjen.
translations.id: Kami mencari pekerja untuk memperbaiki kebocoran.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en arbetare för att fixa läckan.
translations.ro: Căutăm un muncitor pentru a repara scurgerea.
translations.cs: Hledáme dělníka, aby opravil únik vody.
translations.da: Vi søger en arbejder til at ordne lækagen.
translations.ja: 漏れを直してくれる作業員を探しています.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; subject of 'cherche'.
3rd person singular present; transitive main verb selecting 'un ouvrier' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'ouvrier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose or target complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'fuite'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' indicating the issue to address.
